description.ko: 라벤더빛 성진이 오래된 어둠 둘레를 천천히 흐르는 고요한 성운의 공허, 무한의 가장자리처럼 장엄하고 신비로운 장면.
description.en: A silent nebular hollow where lavender star dust drifts around an ancient darkness, vast and mysterious as the edge of infinity.

prompt: Cosmic Deep artwork for VOID-3: an immense starless hollow suspended inside a field of cold nebular frost, seen as a vast negative-space oval where no light survives. Around its rim, layered clouds of #0D0221 abyssal darkness and #3D1A78 deep violet gas form slow, shell-like pressure waves, as if ancient space itself is breathing once every thousand years. High-density streams of silver-lavender star dust drift in delicate arcs across the foreground, each particle catching faint #E6E6FA light from remote, dying star clusters scattered like ash beyond the void. Thin #7B68EE ion filaments trace silent magnetic currents through the haze without becoming a vortex or ring. The composition should feel impossibly large, quiet, and ominous: no planets, no spacecraft, no humanoid figures, no central black hole, only infinite emptiness, cosmic horror majesty, mysterious atmosphere, ultra-detailed deep space photography, soft volumetric glow, restrained contrast, very slow celestial motion.
